data.body: CI (#583 S2a) caught a real bug local runs missed: tests/autolander/_fakes.py basename-collided with tests/integration/rebar_reconciler/jira_contract/_fakes.py (pytest prepend mode, no __init__.py -> both import as top-level _fakes -> reconciler ImportError). Fix: renamed to _autolander_fakes.py + fixed 7 imports; rebuilt S2a/S2b/S2c commits (Change-Ids preserved via commit -C; complete fakes module lands in S2a to avoid cross-commit edits). Verified: tree diff vs backup = ONLY the rename; reconciler+autolander 48 passed together. Re-pushed stack. LESSON: run FULL make test (not just tests/autolander) before pushing a new test module.
